SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF JAMES C PISTORINO IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO STAY ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS' MOTION TO STAY ARBITRATION IS DENIED. EXYGY DID NOT WAIVE ARBITRATION BY FILING AND PROSECUTING CASE NUMBER 520971 AGAINST MR. MCMANUS. IN THAT ACTION, EXYGY DID NOT ALLEGE ANY AGENCY RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN MR. MCMANUS AND GREATNONPROFITS. EXYGY ASSERTED A CLAIM FOR INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACTUAL RELATIONS AGAINST MR. MCMANUS. MR. MCMANUS IS NOT A PARTY TO THE TERMS & AGREEMENT OR A PARTY TO THE ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S PRIOR SUIT AGAINST MR. MCMANUS DID NOT ADDRESS MATTERS COVERED BY THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT BECAUSE IT ONLY PROCEEDED AGAINST MR. MCMANUS IN HIS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY AND NEVER RESOLVED HIS AGENCY STATUS. (EXYGY, LLC V. ANDREW MCMANUS CGC-12-520971.) ADDITIONALLY, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN IT WAS PREJUDICED BY THE PRIOR SUIT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES PISTORINO, ESQ., 650.838.4392, FOR PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS.
RANDALL GARTEISER, ESQ., 415.785.3762, FOR DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF GREAT NON PROFITS' Petition To Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award is Denied. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Defendant Exygy, Llc'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES PISTORINO OF PERKINS COIE, LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 838-4392 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHRISTOPHER A. HONEA, TEL. NO. 785-3762 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.


RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Exygy, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. In opposition to the motion, Plaintiff has refiled papers it filed in opposition to a demurrer on November 28, 2012. Plaintiff fails to show that the award is defective and should be vacated. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitraiton Award
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES PISTORINO, ESQ., 650.838.4392, FOR PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS.
RANDALL GARTEISER, ESQ., 415.785.3762, FOR DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC.

RULING: matter discusssed. at conclusion of discussion, the court vacates its tentative and continues hearing on DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award to february 25, 2013 at 9:30 am in department 302. counsel is ordered to deliver courtesy copies of opposition to department 302 within 2 days. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher A. Honea, Esq. of Garteiser Honea, Tel. 415.785.3762, for Defendant and moving party;
James C. Pistorino, Esq. of Perkins Coie, LLP, Tel. 650.838.4392, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant's prior suit against Mr. McManus did not address matters covered by the arbitration agreement because it only proceeded against Mr. McManus in his individual capacity and never resolved his agency status. (Exygy, LLC v. Andrew McManus CGC-12-520971.) Additionally, Plaintiff has not shown it was prejudiced by the prior suit. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Continued To Jan-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EXYGY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued on the court's own motion to January 14, 2013. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Stay Arbitration; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES PISTORINO, ESQ., PERKINS COIE, 650.838.4392, FOR PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS.
CHRISTOPHER HONEA, ESQ., GARTEISER HONEA, 415.785.3762, FOR DEFENDNAT EXYGY, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFF GREATNONPROFITS' Motion To Stay Arbitration is denied. Exygy did not waive arbitration by filing and prosecuting case number 520971 against Mr. McManus. In that action, Exygy did not allege any agency relationship between Mr. McManus and GreatNonprofits. Exygy asserted a claim for intentional interference with contractual relations against Mr. McManus. Mr. McManus is not a party to the Terms & Agreement or a party to the arbitration. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
